conversation.definition: A message exchange between a user and Rita

message.definition: A single unit of communication within a conversation

data-source.definition: An external system connected for knowledge or ticketing

organization.definition: A tenant with members, settings, and data sources

member.definition: A person belonging to an organization with a specific role

role.definition: Access tier within an organization: owner, admin, or user

cluster.definition: A grouping of related support tickets identified by ML

ticket.definition: A support request from an ITSM system

knowledge-article.definition: A piece of knowledge content from a connected source

autopilot.definition: Mode where Rita handles conversations without human intervention

iframe.definition: Embeddable chat interface for host pages with public guest access

webhook.definition: HTTP endpoint called to relay messages to external automation services

sse.definition: Server-Sent Events channel for pushing real-time updates to clients

invitation.definition: A link sent to onboard a new member into an organization

credential-delegation.definition: Secure one-time link for credential setup without direct password handling

workflow.definition: An automated process triggered by events or user actions
